utterances.speaker: Stevens
utterances.text: Oh , excuse me . I forgot my briefcase you know , by accident .

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: Forgot something else too you bastard !

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: You are not feeling left out or anything are you ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No . No , not at all , that is ... that is ridiculous .

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: Everybody else got one , and you want one too . Do not you ?

emotion_cause.span: 7_Everybody else got one , and you want one too .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Ye ... ye ... yeah , yes I do !

utterances.speaker: Doug
utterances.text: Now get on out of here , you !
